The Problem

Most manufacturers lose tenders before the bid is ever read.

Tier 1 buyers check compliance first. If your certifications, cyber posture, or sustainability credentials don't pass the gateway — your price never gets seen.

The buyers you want — NHS, MOD, local authorities, FTSE supply chains — all require the same things. Most Essex and Kent manufacturers aren't ready.

Missing ISO 9001 No Cyber Essentials Weak ESG evidence No Modern Slavery statement Incomplete GDPR documentation No bid writing support
The Process

Four steps from where you are
to where you need to be.

No jargon. No upsell agenda. One co-ordinated plan that gets you tender-ready — and keeps you there.

01

Compliance Prescription Diagnostic

A structured assessment across 8 compliance domains — 39 questions that map every gap between where you are and where a tier 1 buyer needs you to be.

02

Your Written Prescription

A prioritised, plain-English report. No jargon. No upsell agenda. A clear roadmap of what needs fixing and in what order to maximise your tender eligibility.

03

Alliance Deployment

We activate only the specialists you need from our Cure Alliance — IT security, H&S, legal, sustainability, bid writers — co-ordinating delivery against your roadmap.

04

Ongoing Retainer & Tender Support

Monthly retainer keeps your compliance current, your evidence pack ready, and your Cure Alliance on standby — so when the right tender lands, you're already qualified to win it.

Coverage

8 Compliance Domains. Every Gap Mapped.

One diagnostic. Every area that matters to tier 1 buyers — assessed, prioritised, actioned.

ISO 9001 Quality Cyber Essentials / CE+ ISO 14001 Environmental Health & Safety Modern Slavery Act GDPR / Data Protection Sustainability & ESG ISO 27001 / Supply Chain IT / OT / IoT Security Bid Writing & Tender Strategy ERP & Digital Readiness Employment Law
The Cure Alliance

14 specialists. One point of contact.

You don't manage the specialists. We do. Every partner vetted, briefed on your roadmap, and co-ordinated by YBSL.

About Rob

30 years in complex compliance.
Now curing your tender‑killing headaches.

I help Essex manufacturers with 10–300 staff stay on top of GDPR, Cyber Essentials, sustainability and ESG — all the moving targets that can quietly kill your bids or expose you to fines and ransomware — by acting as your "hospital administrator" and co-ordinating the right specialists.

Rob Atkins is the Founder & Principal Consultant of Your Best Solution Limited. After three decades selling and delivering IT, networking, cybersecurity and telecoms solutions — including complex, multi-disciplinary projects for organisations from 10 to 45,000 employees — I now focus on owner-managed and mid-sized manufacturers.

I act as a trusted advisor to the MD and leadership team, who are under pressure to win more work, stay compliant and keep operations running. My job is to listen, diagnose the real problems, and co-ordinate the right mix of alliance partners and processes so you get less pain and more profit — simplifying the tech, taking tenders and compliance off your shoulders, and helping you build a competitive edge step by step.

My business model is to not just get you tender-win ready — but to keep you that way.

Ready to find out where you stand?

Email Rob directly. An honest conversation about your compliance gaps — no sales pitch, no obligation.
